fullText: taking your AI websites from this to this is actually very easy alls we have to do is create a custom background and add a little motion to it so you just want to create an image with some sort of AI model whether that's Nano Banana Pro or something like MidJourney right here ideally you have an idea of how you want the layout of that landing page to look like because I knew I wanted the image to be on the right the main focus and have some sort of negative space on the lefth hand side where I could put the actual text now as you can see here Claude Code is smart enough to kind of add some shadowing so you can see the text better and the image is able to pop more on the right hand side now to give it that looping subtle image effect is again relatively simple we're just going to download this image and then head to VO3.1 or cling 3.0 throw the original image in as both the starting and the end frame and ask it to create very subtle motion graphics the prompts I used were extremely basic all I said was extremely subtle motion have the clouds move slightly where everything else remains still that's because you don't want to overdo it with the motion you want it to look almost like a parallax type effect and from there I downloaded the video and just gave it to Claude Code and this is a really easy way to make your AI websites look a bit
